content: GGUF is a versioned binary format (v3): magic, version uint32, tensor_count uint64, metadata_kv_count, then a key-value metadata store (namespaced general./tokenizer./llama. etc.), then per-tensor info (name, dims, ggml_type quant enum, offset), then padded tensor data (alignment default 32). ~40 ggml_type quant enums: legacy Q4_0/Q8_0, K-quants Q2_K..Q8_K, IQ importance-aware types. general.file_type marks dominant quant. Quantization scheme version tracked separately via general.quantization_version so format name can be stable while block layout evolves.
